summary: HR Management iteration 7 testing complete - All 10 backend tests passed, frontend UI tests passed. New features verified: HR alerts endpoint for expiring residency/insurance (20 days) and contracts (70 days), employee_number field, Arabic status options, project optional, photo field removed, PDF/Excel export, sidebar fixes.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/hr/alerts endpoint correctly returns alerts for expiring residency/insurance within 20 days and contracts within 70 days
HREmployee model has employee_number field and no photo field
Arabic status options correctly implemented: على رأس العمل, خروج وعودة, متغيب عن العمل, تم نقل كفالته, إجازة سنوية, إجازة اضطرارية
Project field is optional when adding employee (can be empty string or omitted)
Frontend HR page shows alerts section at top with color-coded priority (red=expired, orange=urgent, yellow=warning)
Employee number column (الرقم الوظيفي) visible in employees table
Photo column correctly removed from employees table
PDF export uses jspdf with autoTable plugin
Sidebar does not show ghost 'مشروع إيصال' link
Project links go to connections-hub when user has water/sewage permissions
seed_data_creation: Test employees/contracts created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: HR Management iteration 7 features fully tested. New endpoint: GET /api/hr/alerts returns alerts for expiring residency/insurance (20 days) and contracts (70 days). HREmployee model updated with employee_number field, no photo field, Arabic status options. Project field is optional. Frontend shows alerts section at top of HR page with color-coded priorities.

tests_performed.test: HR alerts for expiring residency within 20 days
tests_performed.details: Creates employee with id_expiry in 10 days, alert generated with type=id_expiry

tests_performed.test: HR alerts for expiring insurance within 20 days
tests_performed.details: Creates employee with insurance_expiry in 15 days, alert generated with type=insurance_expiry

tests_performed.test: HR alerts for expiring contracts within 70 days
tests_performed.details: Creates contract with end_date in 50 days, alert generated with type=contract_expiry
All 6 Arabic statuses accepted: على رأس العمل, خروج وعودة, متغيب عن العمل, تم نقل كفالته, إجازة سنوية, إجازة اضطرارية
Employee created without project field (project is optional)

tests_performed.test: POST /api/hr/employees works with empty project string

tests_performed.details: GET /api/hr/employees response does not require photo field
Page loads with HR Management title

tests_performed.test: Frontend: HR Alerts section at top

tests_performed.details: Column 'الرقم الوظيفي' visible in employees table
All 6 Arabic status options in dropdown
No ghost link found in sidebar
